videos.name: operation_demo
videos.purpose: Analyze a recorded operation video and extract representative frames for report evidence.

recordings.name: screen_recording
recordings.purpose: Record a short local operation clip when screenshots are not enough.

notes: PyAV is the preferred parser because it exposes FFmpeg containers, streams, codecs, packets, and frames.
OpenCV is the fallback for simple metadata, frame extraction, and mss-based screen recording.
OBS WebSocket/CLI remains the fallback when the assignment specifically requires recording through recording software.
